title: Horror Killer
description: Horror mode with classic mobs like mimicer, irritator, nightmare stalker and many more.
body:
If you like to be scared, this modpack is for you! Lots of strange sounds and anomalies. Have fun with the horror modpack. This modpack adds a lot of horror weapons, guns and even Spartan weapons! Features: 🌲Biomes - Lots of new and varied biomes 🐻 Animals - Lots of new animals like deer, duck and many more
🗿waystones - If you place a waystone somewhere or there was one already there, it will teleport you to any other waystone!
👻 Horror Monsters - Monsters like the one who watches, the man from the fog, pale hound and many more
🎥 Security-Cameras, Traps, remote launchers and chests with a code-it's all here!
